title: Plantable Golden Carrot
description: Make Golden Carrot Plantable, with balancing game mechanics!
body:
![The growing crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a382efc1ecf2e6303e1d6dcc7c04be23bb680a56.png)

**--A mod that allows you to grow golden carrot, but with an indirect approach.**

**--A bunch of balancing mechanics is introduced to let you plant this golden crop.**

**Addition:**

--Vitalized Golden Carrot, with the magic of undying, you can transform the ordinary golden carrot into a plantable seed!

--Golden Farmland, the farmalnd specifically made for growing the golden crop.
